def negative_module_level_side_effect_outside_main_guard():
    rule_id = "module_level_side_effect_outside_main_guard"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Module-level side effect such as signal.signal or threading.Thread outside an if __name__ guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
